info.title: Idun Agent Manager API
info.description: Idun service for managing AI agents

get.description: Initiates the Google OIDC authorization code flow.
Exchanges the authorization code for tokens and sets a session cookie.
Returns the current user session with fresh workspace data from DB.

schema.title: Response Me Api V1 Auth Me Get
Response Logout Api V1 Auth Logout Post
Response Basic Signup Api V1 Auth Basic Signup Post
Response Basic Login Api V1 Auth Basic Login Post

post.description: Create a new managed agent with an EngineConfig. The agent is created in DRAFT status.

get.description: List all managed agents with pagination.

schema.title: Response List Agents Api V1 Agents  Get

get.description: Generate a unique API key (hash) for an agent to authenticate API requests.

get.summary: Get agent config by API key
get.description: Retrieve agent configuration using API key authentication (Bearer token).
Retrieve a specific managed agent by its UUID with complete configuration details.

delete.description: Permanently delete a managed agent and all its configuration data.

patch.description: Partially update an agent's configuration. Only the name and engine_config field can be updated if provided.

put.description: Update only the status field of an agent. Used by the health check flow to set active/draft without touching config.

get.description: Basic health check.

schema.title: Response Health Check Api V1 Healthz Get

get.description: Readiness check including database connectivity.

schema.title: Response Readiness Check Api V1 Readyz Get

get.description: Get application version and name from FastAPI app metadata.

schema.title: Response Version Api V1 Version Get

post.description: Create a new managed MCP server configuration.

get.description: List managed MCP server configurations with pagination.

schema.title: Response List Mcp Servers Api V1 Mcp Servers  Get

get.summary: Get managed MCP server by ID
get.description: Get a managed MCP server configuration by ID.

delete.description: Delete a managed MCP server configuration permanently.

post.summary: Discover tools from an MCP server
post.description: Connect to an MCP server and return its available tools.
Create a new managed observability configuration.

get.description: List managed observability configurations with pagination.

schema.title: Response List Observabilities Api V1 Observability  Get

get.summary: Get managed observability config by ID
get.description: Get a managed observability configuration by ID.

delete.description: Delete a managed observability configuration permanently.

post.description: Create a new managed memory configuration.

get.description: List managed memory configurations with pagination.

schema.title: Response List Memories Api V1 Memory  Get

get.summary: Get managed memory config by ID
get.description: Get a managed memory configuration by ID.

delete.description: Delete a managed memory configuration permanently.

get.description: Retrieve the list of supported agent frameworks in the platform.

schema.title: Response List Agent Frameworks Api V1 Agent Frameworks  Get

post.description: Create a new managed guardrail configuration.

get.description: List managed guardrail configurations with pagination.

schema.title: Response List Guardrails Api V1 Guardrails  Get

get.summary: Get managed guardrail config by ID
get.description: Get a managed guardrail configuration by ID.

delete.description: Delete a managed guardrail configuration permanently.

get.description: Return all workspaces the current user is a member of.

schema.title: Response List Workspaces Api V1 Workspaces  Get

post.description: Create a workspace and add the current user as owner.

patch.description: Update a workspace name. Requires admin or owner role.

delete.description: Delete a workspace. Only owners can delete workspaces.

post.description: Create a new managed SSO configuration.

get.description: List managed SSO configurations with pagination.

schema.title: Response List Ssos Api V1 Sso  Get

get.summary: Get managed SSO config by ID
get.description: Get a managed SSO configuration by ID.

delete.description: Delete a managed SSO configuration permanently.

post.description: Create a new managed integration configuration.

get.description: List managed integration configurations with pagination.

schema.title: Response List Integrations Api V1 Integrations  Get

get.description: Get a managed integration configuration by ID.

delete.description: Delete a managed integration configuration permanently.

get.description: Return all members of a workspace with user details.

post.summary: Add a user to the workspace or create a pending invitation
post.description: Add an existing user or create a pending invitation by email.

schema.title: Response Add Member Api V1 Workspaces  Workspace Id  Members Post

delete.summary: Remove a member from the workspace
delete.description: Remove a member from the workspace.

post.description:
Create a new prompt version.

Auto-increments the version number for the given ``prompt_id`` within the
workspace.  The ``latest`` tag is added automatically and removed from any
previous version that carried it.

get.description: List prompts with optional filters and pagination.

schema.title: Response List Prompts Api V1 Prompts  Get

get.summary: List prompts assigned to an agent
get.description: List all prompts assigned to a specific agent.

schema.title: Response List Agent Prompts Api V1 Prompts Agent  Agent Id  Get

get.description: Get a prompt by its UUID.

patch.description:
Update a prompt's tags. Content is immutable.

The ``latest`` tag is auto-managed and cannot be manually added or removed.

delete.description:
Delete a prompt version permanently.

If the deleted version carried the ``latest`` tag, the next-highest
version is promoted automatically.

post.description: Assign a prompt to an agent. Both must belong to the same workspace.

schema.title: Response Assign Prompt Api V1 Prompts  Id  Assign  Agent Id  Post

delete.description: Remove a prompt assignment from an agent.

botToken.title: Bottoken
botToken.description: Discord bot token (used for REST API calls).

publicKey.title: Publickey
publicKey.description: Ed25519 public key from the Discord application settings. Used to verify interaction webhook signatures.

guildId.title: Guildid
guildId.description: Optional guild (server) ID to restrict the integration to.

DiscordIntegrationConfig.title: DiscordIntegrationConfig
DiscordIntegrationConfig.description:
Discord bot configuration for the Interactions Endpoint webhook.

Requires a Discord application with a bot user created at
https://discord.com/developers/applications.  The ``public_key`` is used
to verify Ed25519 signatures on incoming interaction payloads.

EngineConfig.title: EngineConfig
EngineConfig.description: Main engine configuration model for the entire Idun Agent Engine.

gcpProjectId.title: Gcpprojectid
gcpProjectId.description: The project identifier where logs and traces will be sent.

region.title: Region
region.description: (Optional) The specific region/zone associated with the resource (e.g., us-central1).

logName.title: Logname
logName.description: The identifier for the log stream (e.g., application-log).

resourceType.title: Resourcetype
resourceType.description: The resource type label (e.g., global, gce_instance, cloud_run_revision).

severity.title: Severity
severity.description: Minimum level to record (e.g., INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL).

transport.title: Transport
transport.description: Selection for delivery method (e.g., BackgroundThread vs Synchronous).

gcpProjectId.title: Gcpprojectid
gcpProjectId.description: The project identifier where logs and traces will be sent.

region.title: Region
region.description: (Optional) The specific region/zone associated with the resource (e.g., us-central1).

traceName.title: Tracename
traceName.description: The name for the trace or tracing session.

samplingRate.title: Samplingrate
samplingRate.description: A number between 0.0 and 1.0 indicating the probability of a request being traced (e.g., 1.0 for 100%, 0.1 for 10%).

flushInterval.title: Flushinterval
flushInterval.description: Time in seconds to wait before sending buffered traces to the cloud.

ignoreUrls.title: Ignoreurls
ignoreUrls.description: A list or comma-separated string of URL paths to exclude from tracing (e.g., /health, /metrics).

GuardrailRef.title: GuardrailRef
GuardrailRef.description: Reference to a managed guardrail with position metadata.

observability.description: (Deprecated) Observability config is deprecated and will be removed in a future release.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Toggle this integration on or off.

IntegrationConfig.title: IntegrationConfig
IntegrationConfig.description:
Top-level integration configuration.

Each integration binds an external messaging provider to the agent.
When the engine starts, it registers webhook endpoints for each
enabled integration.

observability.description: (Deprecated) Observability config is deprecated and will be removed in a future release.

apiKey.title: Apikey
apiKey.description: The unique authentication key from the LangSmith settings page.

projectName.title: Projectname
projectName.description: The name of the project in LangSmith to bucket these traces under (e.g., prod-chatbot-v1).

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: The URL endpoint, used primarily if you are self-hosting LangSmith or using a specific enterprise instance. (e.g., https://api.smith.langchain.com)

name.title: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this MCP server.

transport.title: Transport
transport.description: Transport type used to reach the MCP server.

url.title: Url
url.description: Endpoint URL for HTTP/S based transports (SSE, streamable_http, websocket).

command.title: Command
command.description: Executable to run when using stdio transport.

args.title: Args
args.description: Arguments to pass to the command for stdio transport.

env.title: Env
env.description: Environment variables to set when spawning stdio servers.

encodingErrorHandler.title: Encodingerrorhandler
encodingErrorHandler.description: Encoding error handler for stdio transport.

timeoutSeconds.title: Timeoutseconds
timeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for HTTP/S transports (maps to `timeout`).

sseReadTimeoutSeconds.title: Ssereadtimeoutseconds
sseReadTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds waiting for SSE events (maps to `sse_read_timeout`).

terminateOnClose.title: Terminateonclose
terminateOnClose.description: Whether to terminate Streamable HTTP sessions on close.

sessionKwargs.title: Sessionkwargs
sessionKwargs.description: Extra keyword arguments forwarded to MCP ClientSession.

role.description: Role to assign. Owners can assign any role; admins can assign member or viewer.

MemberAdd.description: Request body to add a user to a workspace.

MemberListResponse.description: Paginated list of workspace members and pending invitations.

MemberPatch.description: Request body to update a member's role.

MemberRead.description: A workspace member with user details.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Toggle SSO enforcement on protected routes.

issuer.title: Issuer
issuer.description: OIDC issuer URL (e.g. https://accounts.google.com). Used to discover the JWKS endpoint via .well-known/openid-configuration.

clientId.title: Clientid
clientId.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID. Used as the default audience for JWT validation when 'audience' is not set.

audience.title: Audience
audience.description: Expected JWT 'aud' claim. Defaults to client_id if not set. Okta client credentials tokens use 'api://default'.

allowedDomains.title: Alloweddomains
allowedDomains.description: Optional list of allowed email domains (e.g. ['company.com']). When set, only tokens whose email claim matches one of these domains are accepted.

allowedEmails.title: Allowedemails
allowedEmails.description: Optional list of specific email addresses allowed access. When set, only tokens whose email claim exactly matches one of these values are accepted.

SSOConfig.title: SSOConfig
SSOConfig.description:
OIDC Single Sign-On configuration.

When enabled, the engine validates JWT tokens on protected routes
(``/agent/invoke``, ``/agent/stream``, ``/agent/copilotkit/stream``)
against the configured OIDC provider's JWKS endpoint, discovered via
``{issuer}/.well-known/openid-configuration``.

ServerConfig.title: ServerConfig
ServerConfig.description: Configuration for the Engine's universal settings.

banned_words.description: A list of strings (words or phrases) to block

competitors.description: Names of competitor companies or products

expected_languages.title: Expected Languages
expected_languages.description: Valid ISO language codes (e.g., en, fr, es)

pii_entities.title: Pii Entities
pii_entities.description: List of PII entity types to detect

signingSecret.title: Signingsecret
signingSecret.description: Signing secret for verifying webhook requests.

SlackIntegrationConfig.title: SlackIntegrationConfig
SlackIntegrationConfig.description:
Slack Events API configuration.

Requires a Slack app with a bot token and signing secret.
The ``signing_secret`` is used to verify incoming webhook requests
via HMAC-SHA256.

TranslationAgentConfig.description: Configuration model for the Translation Agent Template.

accessToken.title: Accesstoken
accessToken.description: Meta Graph API permanent access token.

verifyToken.title: Verifytoken
verifyToken.description: Webhook verification token. Must match the token configured in the Meta App Dashboard webhook settings.

WhatsAppIntegrationConfig.title: WhatsAppIntegrationConfig
WhatsAppIntegrationConfig.description:
WhatsApp Business Cloud API configuration.

Requires a Meta Business account with a WhatsApp Business API setup.
The ``verify_token`` is used by Meta to validate the webhook endpoint
during initial registration.

WorkspaceRole.title: WorkspaceRole
WorkspaceRole.description: Workspace membership roles, ordered by privilege level.
